contract_rules.limitation: CONTRACT mode can hide a genuine behavioral gap when the only witness uses type, identity, a custom object, or another excluded input. This deliberate false-negative risk means its rate is execution-grounded only under the stated caller contract, not universal truth.
contract_rules.program_replacement_rationale: A test that replaces part of the program is no longer evidence about the program.
contract_rules.target_arguments: plain literals, containers of plain literals, unary signed numeric literals, or local names bound directly to those values
